review_title: A good alternative for accurate analytics
description: Pleasant, can get to see insights. Some which are much harder to see now in GA4. They also have heat maps and funnels in one.
author: Charles A.
pros: It's easier to analyze than Google Analytics 4.
cons: Support is by email but they do respond. Just not round the clock.

description: I am very satisfied with Matomo, it is a very well engineered product
author: Filippo V.
pros: It is not too intrusive, nevertheless it has a lot of useful features. Very nice User Interface.
cons: It is difficult to convince not tech people to use it. It is not as famous as google analytics.

review_title: Matomo for tracking every user movements
description: Really positive experience if you use it in well maintainable manner
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: We used matomo in for a unique requirement which was to track all the use interaction and we wished all those things downloaded on our premise which gets really easy with matomo cause you can setup matomo on your servers.
cons: We faced some issues when dealing with different browser which can be sometime frustrating cause some ad blocker even blocks running of javascript that can stop from matomo script from loading. Once got into matomo and you dont spred the knowledge with teams it might create headaches for someone new to this and its been really hard to make maintain all this events once the databases and events grow

review_title: Awesome Open Source and Privacy-Conscious Alternative to Google Analytics
description: Overall, Matomo is my favorite analytics platform. It does everything that myself and my clients need. The platform has been around a long time (formerly Piwik) and has proven to be very reliable. Using the API to create custom reports is also easy and super useful.
author: Nick T.
pros: Matomo is open source and self-hosted. It's easy to setup, manage, and implement tracking. It includes many of the advanced features you'd expect in an analytics platform. The best part is that you're in control of your data and privacy.
cons: There are a lot of premium features that are pretty expensive. I wish some of these were open source, standard features of the software, but I guess developers have to eat!

description: We’re using it since early Piwik days. Never stopped working.
author: Renick B.
pros: Be GDPR compliant with having visitors activity metrics. Very needed for improving relevant content. Can be hosted on same server as the clients project, and just works.
cons: UI is a bit outdated atm. Can be improved, but works.

description: I can definetly recommened Matomo, it is a great way to monitor your sites while being ethical.
author: Paul G.
pros: I use both Matomo and Google Analytics side-by-side and I'm really impressed how great Matomo works: Once installed on a company-owned server the software works great and is intuitive - and the data protection is not as big of a problem if you host (and own by that matter) the data on your own server.
cons: I had a few problems running Matomo in a container and setting up a reverse proxy, but after those inital problems everything worked flawlessly.

author: Ricardo R.
pros: We've been using it since 2019 and it's a replacement for our Google Search Appliance (GSA). Matomo behaved as a quality alternative for content search on our intranet and has met our expectations with an excellent cost-benefit ratio and ease of use. We have no hesitation in recommending it to other users.
cons: If a page had very little access, it is difficult to find its data in the reports, as it only displays the most accessed.

author: Boris S.
pros: I really appreciated the ease of installation, both as a solution and also the deployment on my sites. If you have already used competing solutions, the operation is intuitive.
cons: The community is smaller than for some other solutions, so there are far fewer articles to explain how to take full advantage of the tool. That being said, the existing articles are well written and comprehensive.

review_title: Easy and your data is safe
description: We use it for onlinestatistiks for our website and also for our customers.
author: Klaus M.
pros: Self-hosting is very simple and comfortable, the web-updater works very fast and all the time.
cons: As there is not as much money behind it as in Google Analytics its not for all the things you can do with Analytics but for daily business all you need is there. For sure it's not compatible to use with other Google Products.

review_title: A great alternative to Google Analytics
description: I implemented matomo for my personal website because I heard about it at my previous job and decided to give it a try. Since the number of visitors is really small, I rarely use the statistics generated by matomo but it's nice to have it.
author: Tiberiu P.
pros: Free On premise installation Easy to update Great UI
cons: With my limited usage of this software I found no issues.

description: Einfach zu bediendene Website-Statistik, die alle Features hat, welche man von anderen Tools wie Google Analytics kennt.
author: Severin L.
pros: Das Setup von Matomo ist sehr einfach. In der Cloud-Variante bietet Matomo großartige integrierte Tools, um die Benutzerfreundlichkeit detaillierter zu verstehen, wie Heatmaps und Splittests. Besonders hervorzuheben ist die Möglichkeit, Matomo ohne Cookies und anonym einzurichten, damit das Tool DSGVO-konform und ohne Nutzerinnen zu nerven, implementiert werden kann. Auch der Google Analytics-Import funktioniert gut, wobei man dafür einen Google API Key erstellen (das ist bei Google recht umständlich) und einige Wochen Geduld mitbringen muss, bis alle Daten importiert sind, da die API von den Abfragen begrenzt ist. Das Whitelabel-Feature ist auch ganz nett.
cons: Wir haben bei einem Kunden eine Migration von der selbstgehosteten Matomo-Lösung auf die Cloud geplant und der Termin wurde seitens Matomo nicht eingehalten. Wir wurden erst Tage später darüber informiert. Der Support war zwar bemüht, hat aber nicht mitgedacht, dass dadurch eine Datenlücke entsteht und wir durch die Woche Verzögerung Informationen verlieren. Eine Zusammenführung mit den Interims-Daten war nicht möglich. Alles in allem sehr ärgerlich, aber ich hoffe, dass es eine Ausnahme ist.

author: Francois K.
pros: Possibilité d'analyser son audience et ses campagne médias de la même manière que chez les concurrents avec des données hébergées en France
cons: Je ne vois pas d'aspect négatif comme utilisateur

review_title: La gran alternativa a Google Analytics
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Lo que más me gusta de Matomo, es que puedes instalarlo en tu servidor y al ser servidor propio ya no dependes de ceder información a terceros como en el caso de google Analytics y te evitas todo el tema del aviso de cookies. Lo tenemos en uno de los proyectos web y es fantástico ¡ recomendable como alternativa a google Analytics!
cons: Cumple perfectamente su función de análisis por lo que no tiene ningún pero para mi

description: je ne peux plus m'en passer et il a soulagé mes craintes face à une éventuelle visite de la CNIL.
author: sébastien S.
pros: Rapide à placer sur n'importe quel serveur, utilise un micro code si facile à intégrer
cons: J'ai mis quelques clics supplémentaires pour télécharger la version que je pouvais auto-hébergé.

review_title: If you need a analytics tool that keeps all data in house
description: Overall I like to work with matomo. We own the data and the handling is easy enough. There is still some slack for approvement, but I guess the need for a secure analytics tool while rise in future and so matomo will have more resources to improve as well. Will see :)
author: Till G.
pros: I love the fact that we can self host matomo and don't have to worry about our analytics data leaving the EU.
cons: It's still not as good as google analytics. You have to work a lot with segments to get the data you want. The Matomo Tag manager ist alright but is less intuitiv to handle then the google tag manager. But after a while I got used to it.

description: Matomo offers a simple setup, a huge amount of features, steady updates and respects the privacy of my users. I really love Matomo.
author: Marvin L.
pros: - Free to host on-premise - Many hosting companies offer a 1-click-installation for Matomo - Easy & straightforward setup - Comprehensive UX - Managed paid plan for people that do not wish to host themselves
cons: - Integration with Google, Facebook & Bing Ads not ready yet (but will be released quite soon)

review_title: Un software poco conosciuto ma una piacevole scoperta
author: Max G.
pros: Ha tutto quello che serve per monitorare gli accessi del sito, semplice da utilizzare e intuitivo
cons: Non ho trovato nessun contro, ho la versione a pagamento
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Arnaud A.
pros: It is a powerful web analytics platform that gives you 100% data ownership.
cons: the support can be purchased separatly but is expensive.

author: Henry C.
pros: The main advantage of Matomo is the protection of user data.
cons: Not getting key words from Google searches.

author: Nadir H.
pros: I have been using Matomo for over 4+ years now. Matomo is a great service! highly recommended.
cons: I cannot think of any cons currently. If I find any cons I will rewrite the review.

author: Salih T.
pros: Easy to use, user friendly gui, secure and strong
cons: Easy to use, user friendly gui, secure and strong

description: Je l'avais installé dans l'optique où GA4 n'était pas conforme aux RGPD mais du coup il a été dacléré conforme par la CNIL. GA4 est pas facile à prendre en main non plus mais franchement c'est quand même plus simple avec l'utilisation de Google tag manager. Et au moins si on arrête on a quand même accès à ses anciennes datas.
author: Thierry G.
pros: il y a quelques fonctionnalités intéressantes par rapport à analytics.
cons: Il faut savoir que si vous décidez d'arrêter l'abonnement à Matomo vous n'aurez plus accès à la plateforme et donc à vos anciennes données. C'est ce qui m'est arrivé. La seule solution c'est que Matomo vous envoie un backup, c'est ce que j'ai demandé mais je n'ai toujours rien reçu. Mais c'est quand même moins ergonomique que l'utilisation de la plateforme. Je suis webmaster et j'utilise de nombreux outils et c'est le premier qui fonctionne comme ça. Bizarre. Sinon c'est surtout la difficulté à configurer qui est le plus décevant. Dès qu'on veut mettre en plce des trackings ou suivre des évennements rien n'est simple.

description: Matomo permet de suivre les activités des visiteurs sur l'ensemble d'un domaine, y compris les sous-domaines. Il permet d'obtenir une vue d'ensemble de toutes les interactions des visiteurs avec notre site web et cela gratuitement
author: Power E.
pros: Matomo propose également des fonctionnalités avancées telles que le suivi des conversions, le suivi des événements, le suivi des objectifs et le suivi des campagnes publicitaires, ainsi qu'une personnalisation plus poussée de l'interface utilisateur.
cons: Matomo peut nécessiter une installation et une configuration plus complexes que Google Analytics, et peut nécessiter un certain niveau de compétence technique.

review_title: Web analysis and monitoring at the highest level
description: If you don't want to use another well-known monitoring tool or place particular value on the server location, etc., Matomo is the right choice for you.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: What convinced us the most at that time was the possibility to analyse our website and our campaigns in a privacy-compliant way. The simple setup of the platform has no influence on the quality of the data.
cons: The user-friendliness is confirmed again and again when we present with Matomo and colleagues immediately know which points have to be clicked on to view the required data. What we are still missing is the simple linking option with Google Ads and other PPC ad providers.

review_title: Analisi minuziosa con un occhio alla privacy
description: Utilizzo MATOMO con installazione su hosting privato senza sfruttare i piani a pagamento proposti. In certi casi mi limito all'utilizzo dell'ottimo plugin (per Wordpress) con risultati ottimali. Il plugin è particolarmente utile per limitare al minimo l'impatto con il GDPR per anonimizzazione totale e compatibilità con altri plugin per la gestione dei cookie rende il lavoro sicuro e facile.
author: Gino C.
pros: Di base la gratuità del prodotto è la carta vincente. Già con l'installazione base è possibile avere i dati più importanti a portata di mano. Le funzionalità a pagamento aggiuntive permettono di raggiungere livelli di analisi estremamente sofisticati, a mio parere, di gran lunga superiori alla concorrenza.
cons: In certi casi, l'installazione e manutenzione di Matomo potrebbero risultare un po' complicati per gli utilizzatori meno ferrati con piattaforme CSM.
